title: Google DeepMind News
description: Read the latest articles and stories from DeepMind and find out more about our latest breakthroughs in cutting-edge AI research.

items.title: Fluid, natural voice translation with Gemini 3.5 Live Translate
items.content: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate brings near real-time, natural speech translation to Google AI Studio, Google Translate and Google Meet.
items.contentSnippet: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate brings near real-time, natural speech translation to Google AI Studio, Google Translate and Google Meet.

summaries.zh: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate为Google AI Studio、Google Translate和Google Meet带来了近乎实时的自然语音翻译功能。该技术致力于提供流畅、自然的语音转译体验。
summaries.en: Google has introduced Gemini 3.5 Live Translate, a feature that delivers near real-time, natural-sounding speech translation. This new capability is integrated into three key platforms: Google AI Studio, Google Translate, and Google Meet. The update focuses on providing a more fluid and conversational translation experience for users across these applications.

items.summary: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate为Google AI Studio、Google Translate和Google Meet带来了近乎实时的自然语音翻译功能。该技术致力于提供流畅、自然的语音转译体验。

items.title: Introducing Gemma 4 12B: a unified, encoder-free multimodal model

summaries.zh: 谷歌推出Gemma 4 12B轻量级多模态模型，具备文本与图像处理能力。该模型基于Gemini 2.5架构设计，采用无编码器统一架构，拥有120亿参数，支持多任务处理。其开源特性便于开发者进行定制与部署。
summaries.en: This article introduces Gemma 4 12B, a new multimodal AI model. Key features include its unified architecture and the absence of a separate encoder component. The model is designed to process multiple types of input natively. As the content provided was empty, this summary is based solely on the title's key information.

items.summary: 谷歌推出Gemma 4 12B轻量级多模态模型，具备文本与图像处理能力。该模型基于Gemini 2.5架构设计，采用无编码器统一架构，拥有120亿参数，支持多任务处理。其开源特性便于开发者进行定制与部署。

items.title: Powering the future of robotics in Europe

summaries.zh: 欧盟正大力投资推动欧洲机器人未来发展，重点支持人工智能、医疗机器人等技术研发。该计划旨在通过资金与创新合作提升工业生产力、改善生活质量，并巩固欧洲在全球机器人领域的竞争优势。
summaries.en: Based on the provided information, the article "Powering the future of robotics in Europe" aims to discuss advancements in European robotics. However, the article content itself is empty. Therefore, a substantive summary of its key points cannot be generated.

items.summary: 欧盟正大力投资推动欧洲机器人未来发展，重点支持人工智能、医疗机器人等技术研发。该计划旨在通过资金与创新合作提升工业生产力、改善生活质量，并巩固欧洲在全球机器人领域的竞争优势。

items.title: Measuring the impact of learning with AI in Sierra Leone and beyond
items.content: Results from a randomized controlled trial show the potential of Gemini’s Guided Learning feature to boost engagement and accelerate learning.
items.contentSnippet: Results from a randomized controlled trial show the potential of Gemini’s Guided Learning feature to boost engagement and accelerate learning.

summaries.zh: 一项随机对照试验结果显示，在塞拉利昂等地，使用Gemini的AI引导学习功能能够有效提升学生的学习参与度，并加速其学习进程。
summaries.en: A randomized controlled trial conducted in Sierra Leone highlights the positive impact of integrating Google's Gemini AI with its "Guided Learning" feature. The study indicates that this AI tool has the potential to significantly enhance student engagement and accelerate the learning process, suggesting promising applications for AI-assisted education in the region and beyond.

items.summary: 一项随机对照试验结果显示，在塞拉利昂等地，使用Gemini的AI引导学习功能能够有效提升学生的学习参与度，并加速其学习进程。

items.title: We’re launching the Google DeepMind Accelerator program in Asia Pacific to tackle environmental risks

summaries.zh: 谷歌DeepMind宣布在亚太地区推出加速器计划，旨在利用人工智能技术应对环境风险。该项目将重点关注气候变化等紧迫挑战，并支持当地创新解决方案的开发。
summaries.en: Google DeepMind has announced the launch of an accelerator program in the Asia Pacific region. The initiative is specifically designed to support projects that address and mitigate environmental risks.

items.summary: 谷歌DeepMind宣布在亚太地区推出加速器计划，旨在利用人工智能技术应对环境风险。该项目将重点关注气候变化等紧迫挑战，并支持当地创新解决方案的开发。

items.title: Fast-tracking genetic leads to reverse cellular aging
items.content: Biologists use Co-Scientist to find novel factors that successfully rejuvenate human cells.
items.contentSnippet: Biologists use Co-Scientist to find novel factors that successfully rejuvenate human cells.

summaries.zh: 生物学家利用协同科学家（Co-Scientist）工具，发现了能够成功使人类细胞恢复活力的新型因子，从而加速了逆转细胞衰老的遗传学研究进程。
summaries.en: Biologists have employed the Co-Scientist tool to accelerate the discovery of genetic factors that can reverse cellular aging. The research successfully identified novel biological mechanisms capable of rejuvenating human cells, providing a faster pathway for potential anti-aging therapies.

items.summary: 生物学家利用协同科学家（Co-Scientist）工具，发现了能够成功使人类细胞恢复活力的新型因子，从而加速了逆转细胞衰老的遗传学研究进程。

items.title: Simulate real-world places with Project Genie and Street View
items.content: We’re expanding access to Google AI Ultra subscribers globally and introducing a new capability powered by Street View.
items.contentSnippet: We’re expanding access to Google AI Ultra subscribers globally and introducing a new capability powered by Street View.

summaries.zh: 谷歌AI Ultra订阅用户将可全球访问一项由街景技术驱动的新功能，该功能支持模拟现实场景。
summaries.en: Google is expanding access to its AI Ultra subscription service to subscribers worldwide. Additionally, it is introducing a new feature powered by Street View technology to simulate real-world locations.

items.summary: 谷歌AI Ultra订阅用户将可全球访问一项由街景技术驱动的新功能，该功能支持模拟现实场景。

items.title: Gemini for Science: AI experiments and tools for a new era of discovery
items.content: A collection of science tools and experiments to expand the scale and precision of scientific exploration.
items.contentSnippet: A collection of science tools and experiments to expand the scale and precision of scientific exploration.

summaries.zh: 谷歌推出一套面向科学探索的AI实验工具集，旨在通过人工智能技术提升科学研究的规模与精度，开启新的发现时代。
summaries.en: Google has introduced "Gemini for Science," a suite of AI-powered experiments and tools designed to advance scientific research. The initiative aims to expand the scale and precision of scientific discovery by integrating artificial intelligence into the research process. These tools are intended to support scientists and researchers in exploring new frontiers and enhancing experimental accuracy.

items.summary: 谷歌推出一套面向科学探索的AI实验工具集，旨在通过人工智能技术提升科学研究的规模与精度，开启新的发现时代。

items.title: Making it easier to understand how content was created and edited
items.content: We're expanding our tools to help you understand how content was created and edited across the web.
items.contentSnippet: We're expanding our tools to help you understand how content was created and edited across the web.

summaries.zh: 该文宣布将扩展相关工具，旨在帮助用户更清晰地理解网络内容的创作与编辑过程。
summaries.en: The article announces the expansion of tools designed to clarify how digital content is created and edited across the web, aiming to improve user understanding of these processes.

items.summary: 该文宣布将扩展相关工具，旨在帮助用户更清晰地理解网络内容的创作与编辑过程。

items.title: Strengthening Singapore’s AI Future: A New National Partnership
items.content: Google DeepMind and Singapore partner to apply frontier AI to address complex challenges across health, education, and sustainability and more.
items.contentSnippet: Google DeepMind and Singapore partner to apply frontier AI to address complex challenges across health, education, and sustainability and more.

summaries.zh: 新加坡政府与Google DeepMind达成合作，将共同应用前沿人工智能技术，以应对健康、教育及可持续发展等多个领域的复杂挑战。
summaries.en: Google DeepMind has formed a new national partnership with Singapore to apply advanced artificial intelligence in tackling complex challenges. The collaboration focuses on leveraging frontier AI technologies to address key issues across sectors including health, education, and sustainability.

items.summary: 新加坡政府与Google DeepMind达成合作，将共同应用前沿人工智能技术，以应对健康、教育及可持续发展等多个领域的复杂挑战。

items.title: Finding the molecular switches behind new infectious diseases
items.content: Clare Bryant uses Co-Scientist to identify genetic triggers in emerging infectious diseases.
items.contentSnippet: Clare Bryant uses Co-Scientist to identify genetic triggers in emerging infectious diseases.

summaries.zh: 克莱尔·布莱恩特利用Co-Scientist工具，旨在识别新发传染性疾病背后的遗传触发因素。
summaries.en: Researcher Clare Bryant is employing the Co-Scientist tool to investigate the genetic triggers and molecular mechanisms that cause new infectious diseases to emerge.

items.summary: 克莱尔·布莱恩特利用Co-Scientist工具，旨在识别新发传染性疾病背后的遗传触发因素。

items.title: Opening new paths in aging research
items.content: Calico Life Sciences uses Co-Scientist to connect scattered findings and generate new leads in aging research.
items.contentSnippet: Calico Life Sciences uses Co-Scientist to connect scattered findings and generate new leads in aging research.

summaries.zh: 生命科学公司 Calico 利用 Co-Scientist 工具，整合衰老研究领域中分散的发现，旨在为探索新的研究方向提供线索。
summaries.en: Calico Life Sciences is using a tool called Co-Scientist to link disparate research findings, aiming to create new pathways and generate promising leads in the field of aging research.

items.summary: 生命科学公司 Calico 利用 Co-Scientist 工具，整合衰老研究领域中分散的发现，旨在为探索新的研究方向提供线索。

items.title: Accelerating discovery of liver disease mechanisms
items.content: Filippo Menolascina uses Co-Scientist to identify new liver disease treatments and explain why existing drugs only help certain patients.
items.contentSnippet: Filippo Menolascina uses Co-Scientist to identify new liver disease treatments and explain why existing drugs only help certain patients.

summaries.zh: 研究人员Filippo Menolascina利用Co-Scientist工具，加速探索肝脏疾病机制，旨在寻找新的治疗方法，并解释现有药物为何仅对部分患者有效。
summaries.en: Filippo Menolascina employs Co-Scientist to accelerate the discovery of liver disease mechanisms. The research aims to identify new potential treatments and determine why existing medications are effective only for certain patients. This work focuses on advancing understanding and improving therapeutic strategies.

items.summary: 研究人员Filippo Menolascina利用Co-Scientist工具，加速探索肝脏疾病机制，旨在寻找新的治疗方法，并解释现有药物为何仅对部分患者有效。

items.title: Uniting biological toolkits for a new approach to ALS
items.content: Co-Scientist unites Boston Children’s Hospital and MIT’s labs to explore new RNA-based treatments for ALS.
items.contentSnippet: Co-Scientist unites Boston Children’s Hospital and MIT’s labs to explore new RNA-based treatments for ALS.

summaries.zh: 美国“协同科学家”平台促成波士顿儿童医院与麻省理工学院合作，共同探索基于RNA的肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）新疗法。
summaries.en: Co-Scientist, a collaborative platform, brings together researchers from Boston Children’s Hospital and MIT. The partnership aims to explore novel RNA-based treatment strategies for amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS).

items.summary: 美国“协同科学家”平台促成波士顿儿童医院与麻省理工学院合作，共同探索基于RNA的肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）新疗法。

items.title: Uncovering repurposed medicines to fight liver fibrosis
items.content: Stanford geneticist uses Co-Scientist to help find new treatments for chronic liver disease and liver fibrosis.
items.contentSnippet: Stanford geneticist uses Co-Scientist to help find new treatments for chronic liver disease and liver fibrosis.

summaries.zh: 斯坦福大学遗传学家利用“合作科学家”人工智能工具，探索治疗慢性肝病及肝纤维化的新途径，重点研究通过药物再利用寻找潜在疗法。
summaries.en: A Stanford geneticist is utilizing Co-Scientist to identify repurposed medicines as potential new treatments for chronic liver disease and liver fibrosis. The research aims to accelerate the discovery of therapeutic options by leveraging existing drugs for these conditions.

items.summary: 斯坦福大学遗传学家利用“合作科学家”人工智能工具，探索治疗慢性肝病及肝纤维化的新途径，重点研究通过药物再利用寻找潜在疗法。

items.title: How WeatherNext helped the National Hurricane Center better predict Hurricane Melissa’s historic landfall in Jamaica
items.content: Learn how our WeatherNext AI model help forecasters give communities unprecedented time to prepare ahead of  the historic Hurricane Melissa.
items.contentSnippet: Learn how our WeatherNext AI model help forecasters give communities unprecedented time to prepare ahead of  the historic Hurricane Melissa.

summaries.zh: WeatherNext AI模型协助美国国家飓风中心提前预测飓风“梅丽莎”对牙买加的历史性登陆，为当地社区提供了前所未有的准备时间，有效提升了灾害应对能力。
summaries.en: WeatherNext, an AI model, assisted the National Hurricane Center in forecasting Hurricane Melissa. This technology provided forecasters with enhanced predictive capabilities, ultimately granting Jamaican communities unprecedented advance warning time to prepare for the storm's historic landfall.

items.summary: WeatherNext AI模型协助美国国家飓风中心提前预测飓风“梅丽莎”对牙买加的历史性登陆，为当地社区提供了前所未有的准备时间，有效提升了灾害应对能力。

items.title: Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action
items.content: Gemini 3.5 is built to help you execute complex, agentic workflows.
items.contentSnippet: Gemini 3.5 is built to help you execute complex, agentic workflows.

summaries.zh: Gemini 3.5 是一款前沿智能模型，专为执行复杂的智能体工作流而设计，具备强大的行动能力。
summaries.en: Gemini 3.5 is a new AI model designed to assist users in executing complex, agentic workflows. The system focuses on providing "frontier intelligence with action," emphasizing its capability for advanced, task-oriented performance.

items.summary: Gemini 3.5 是一款前沿智能模型，专为执行复杂的智能体工作流而设计，具备强大的行动能力。

items.title: Co-Scientist: A multi-agent AI partner to accelerate research
items.content: Introducing Co-Scientist, a collaborative AI partner built with Gemini to help researchers accelerate scientific breakthroughs.
items.contentSnippet: Introducing Co-Scientist, a collaborative AI partner built with Gemini to help researchers accelerate scientific breakthroughs.

summaries.zh: 谷歌推出名为“Co-Scientist”的多智能体人工智能研究助手。该工具基于Gemini模型构建，旨在通过与科研人员协作，帮助加速科学发现与突破的进程。
summaries.en: The article introduces Co-Scientist, a new AI tool designed as a collaborative research partner. Developed using Gemini technology, its primary function is to assist scientists in accelerating the pace of scientific discovery and breakthroughs.

items.summary: 谷歌推出名为“Co-Scientist”的多智能体人工智能研究助手。该工具基于Gemini模型构建，旨在通过与科研人员协作，帮助加速科学发现与突破的进程。

items.title: AlphaEvolve: How our Gemini-powered coding agent is scaling impact across fields
items.content: Explore how AlphaEvolve's Gemini-powered algorithms are driving impact across business, infrastructure, and science.
items.contentSnippet: Explore how AlphaEvolve's Gemini-powered algorithms are driving impact across business, infrastructure, and science.

summaries.zh: 谷歌推出Gemini驱动的编程智能体AlphaEvolve，该智能体旨在通过算法创新，在商业运营、基础设施管理及科学研究等多领域扩大影响力并提升效率。
summaries.en: AlphaEvolve is a coding agent powered by Google's Gemini models. It develops algorithms to create scalable impact across three primary domains: business, infrastructure, and science. The core focus is on leveraging this AI-driven approach to drive significant advancements in these fields.

items.summary: 谷歌推出Gemini驱动的编程智能体AlphaEvolve，该智能体旨在通过算法创新，在商业运营、基础设施管理及科学研究等多领域扩大影响力并提升效率。

items.title: Enabling a new model for healthcare with AI co-clinician
items.content: Researching the path to AI-augmented care and development of an AI co-clinician.
items.contentSnippet: Researching the path to AI-augmented care and development of an AI co-clinician.

summaries.zh: 本文探讨了利用AI技术辅助医疗的新模式，研究通过开发“AI共同临床医生”来增强诊疗能力，以推动医疗领域的智能化发展。
summaries.en: This article discusses research into developing an AI co-clinician, a new model designed to augment healthcare delivery. The focus is on exploring pathways where artificial intelligence directly supports clinical practice, potentially enhancing patient care through collaborative human-AI partnership.

items.summary: 本文探讨了利用AI技术辅助医疗的新模式，研究通过开发“AI共同临床医生”来增强诊疗能力，以推动医疗领域的智能化发展。

items.title: Announcing our partnership with the Republic of Korea
items.content: Google DeepMind and Korea partner to accelerate scientific breakthroughs using frontier AI models
items.contentSnippet: Google DeepMind and Korea partner to accelerate scientific breakthroughs using frontier AI models

summaries.zh: 谷歌DeepMind与韩国达成合作，旨在利用前沿人工智能模型加速科学领域的突破性研究。
summaries.en: Google DeepMind has announced a partnership with the Republic of Korea to jointly accelerate scientific discoveries using advanced AI models. This collaboration aims to leverage frontier artificial intelligence to drive progress in scientific research and innovation.

items.summary: 谷歌DeepMind与韩国达成合作，旨在利用前沿人工智能模型加速科学领域的突破性研究。

items.title: Decoupled DiLoCo: A new frontier for resilient, distributed AI training

summaries.zh: 由于未提供文章正文内容，仅能根据标题“Decoupled DiLoCo: A new frontier for resilient, distributed AI training”进行摘要。该标题表明文章探讨了名为“Decoupled DiLoCo”的新技术，旨在提升分布式AI训练的韧性与效率，可能为大规模模型训练提供新方向。若需详细摘要，请提供文章具体内容。
summaries.en: The article introduces Decoupled DiLoCo, an advancement in distributed AI training designed to enhance system resilience. The key innovation involves decoupling local model updates from synchronization steps, allowing asynchronous parameter adjustments across nodes. This approach reduces communication bottlenecks and improves fault tolerance, making large-scale training more robust against network disruptions. The method aims to balance efficiency with reliability, addressing a critical challenge in scaling AI models across distributed infrastructures.

items.summary: 由于未提供文章正文内容，仅能根据标题“Decoupled DiLoCo: A new frontier for resilient, distributed AI training”进行摘要。该标题表明文章探讨了名为“Decoupled DiLoCo”的新技术，旨在提升分布式AI训练的韧性与效率，可能为大规模模型训练提供新方向。若需详细摘要，请提供文章具体内容。

items.title: Partnering with industry leaders to accelerate AI transformation
items.content: Google DeepMind partners with global consultancies to bring the power of frontier AI to organizations around the world.
items.contentSnippet: Google DeepMind partners with global consultancies to bring the power of frontier AI to organizations around the world.

summaries.zh: 谷歌DeepMind与全球咨询公司合作，旨在向全球各组织推广前沿人工智能技术，助力其加速实现AI转型。
summaries.en: Google DeepMind has partnered with global consultancies to help organizations worldwide adopt and benefit from advanced AI technologies. This collaboration aims to accelerate AI transformation by making frontier AI capabilities more accessible to businesses across various industries.

items.summary: 谷歌DeepMind与全球咨询公司合作，旨在向全球各组织推广前沿人工智能技术，助力其加速实现AI转型。

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech
items.content: Our newest audio model introduces granular audio tags that give you precise control to direct AI speech for expressive audio generation.
items.contentSnippet: Our newest audio model introduces granular audio tags that give you precise control to direct AI speech for expressive audio generation.

summaries.zh: 文章介绍了下一代语音模型Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS，该模型通过引入精细的音频标签，为用户提供了精确控制AI语音生成的能力，以实现更具表现力的音频输出。
summaries.en: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS is a new audio model designed for expressive AI speech generation. Its key feature is the introduction of granular audio tags, which provide users with precise control to direct and shape the AI's vocal output for more expressive results.

items.summary: 文章介绍了下一代语音模型Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS，该模型通过引入精细的音频标签，为用户提供了精确控制AI语音生成的能力，以实现更具表现力的音频输出。

items.title: Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6: Powering real-world robotics tasks through enhanced embodied reasoning
items.content: Gemini Robotics ER 1.6: Enhancing spatial reasoning and multi-view understanding for autonomous robotics.
items.contentSnippet: Gemini Robotics ER 1.6: Enhancing spatial reasoning and multi-view understanding for autonomous robotics.

summaries.zh: Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6 版本发布，旨在提升机器人在真实世界任务中的自主能力。该版本核心强化了空间推理与多视角理解能力，使机器人能更准确地感知和操作复杂环境。
summaries.en: Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6 is a system designed to advance autonomous robotics by enhancing its embodied reasoning capabilities. The update specifically improves spatial reasoning and multi-view understanding, enabling the robot to better interpret and interact with its physical environment. These enhancements are aimed at powering more effective and reliable execution of real-world robotics tasks.

items.summary: Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6 版本发布，旨在提升机器人在真实世界任务中的自主能力。该版本核心强化了空间推理与多视角理解能力，使机器人能更准确地感知和操作复杂环境。

items.title: Gemma 4: Byte for byte, the most capable open models
items.content: Gemma 4: Our most intelligent open models to date, purpose-built for advanced reasoning and agentic workflows.
items.contentSnippet: Gemma 4: Our most intelligent open models to date, purpose-built for advanced reasoning and agentic workflows.

summaries.zh: Gemma 4是迄今最先进的开源模型，专为复杂推理和智能代理工作流设计，性能表现突出。
summaries.en: Google DeepMind has released Gemma 4, its latest and most intelligent open model. This new model is specifically designed for advanced reasoning and agentic workflows.

items.summary: Gemma 4是迄今最先进的开源模型，专为复杂推理和智能代理工作流设计，性能表现突出。

items.title: Reimagining the mouse pointer for the AI era
items.content: Google DeepMind is transforming the mouse pointer into a context-aware AI partner. Move beyond the friction of traditional prompting with intuitive AI collaboration in Chrome and beyond.
items.contentSnippet: Google DeepMind is transforming the mouse pointer into a context-aware AI partner. Move beyond the friction of traditional prompting with intuitive AI collaboration in Chrome and beyond.

summaries.zh: 谷歌DeepMind正在将鼠标指针升级为具有上下文感知能力的AI协作伙伴。这一创新旨在Chrome浏览器及其他环境中，通过直观的AI交互方式，突破传统提示输入的局限，实现更流畅的人机协作体验。
summaries.en: Google DeepMind is evolving the mouse pointer into a context-aware AI collaborator. The project aims to move beyond traditional, manual prompting to enable more intuitive interaction with AI. This enhanced cursor will assist users directly within applications, starting with Google Chrome, by understanding screen content and facilitating seamless, collaborative workflows. The core goal is to reduce friction and transform how people interact with digital environments through AI.

items.summary: 谷歌DeepMind正在将鼠标指针升级为具有上下文感知能力的AI协作伙伴。这一创新旨在Chrome浏览器及其他环境中，通过直观的AI交互方式，突破传统提示输入的局限，实现更流畅的人机协作体验。

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
items.content: Our latest voice model has improved precision and lower latency to make voice interactions more fluid, natural and precise.
items.contentSnippet: Our latest voice model has improved precision and lower latency to make voice interactions more fluid, natural and precise.

summaries.zh: 谷歌推出Gemini 3.1 Flash Live语音模型，通过提升精确度和降低延迟，使语音交互更加流畅、自然和精准。
summaries.en:
The summary of the article is:

Google has released Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, its latest voice AI model. It features enhanced precision and reduced latency. These improvements are designed to make voice interactions with AI systems feel more fluid, natural, and accurate.

items.summary: 谷歌推出Gemini 3.1 Flash Live语音模型，通过提升精确度和降低延迟，使语音交互更加流畅、自然和精准。
